tags.name: dvfy-accordion
tags.description:
Grouped accordion that wraps dvfy-section elements.

In exclusive mode, opening one section automatically closes the others.
Supports keyboard navigation with arrow keys between section headers.

attributes.name: exclusive
attributes.description: Only one section open at a time

tags.name: dvfy-alert
tags.description: Alert/notification banner with status-based styling.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Alert status: info | success | warning | danger (default: "info")

attributes.name: dismissible
attributes.description: Show close button to dismiss the alert

tags.name: dvfy-auth
tags.description: Authentication forms with sign-in and sign-up modes, OAuth support, and optional modal wrapping.

attributes.name: brand
attributes.description: Brand name text (hidden when logo is present)

attributes.name: logo
attributes.description: Logo image URL (shown instead of brand text)

attributes.name: modal
attributes.description: Wrap form in a modal dialog

attributes.name: signin-url
attributes.description: "Already have an account?" link URL (sign-up mode)

tags.name: dvfy-avatar
tags.description: User avatar with image and initials fallback.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: User name (used for initials fallback and alt text)

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Status indicator dot: online | offline | busy

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description: Add hover effect and dispatch click event

events.name: avatar-click
events.description: Interactive avatar clicked, detail: { name, src }

tags.name: dvfy-avatar-group
tags.description: Overlapping avatar stack with overflow indicator.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Maximum avatars to show before "+N" overflow badge

tags.name: dvfy-badge
tags.description: Status badge with dot indicator and outline variant.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Status color: neutral | success | warning | danger | info (default: "neutral")

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

tags.name: dvfy-breadcrumb
tags.description: Breadcrumb navigation with automatic separator insertion.

slots.description: Breadcrumb items as <a> elements; last child is marked as current page

tags.name: dvfy-button
tags.description: Button component with multiple variants and sizes.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Button style: default | subtle | outline | ghost | danger (default: "default")

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Icon-only mode with square aspect ratio

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: HTML button type: button | submit | reset (default: "button")

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Show loading state with spinner indicator

tags.name: dvfy-card
tags.description: Content card with elevation and interactive variants.

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description: Enable hover effect and cursor pointer

tags.name: dvfy-carousel
tags.description:
Carousel container. Wraps dvfy-slide elements in a horizontally scrollable
snap container. Navigation buttons and pagination dots are rendered entirely
by CSS pseudo-elements on Chrome 135+; older browsers see a plain swipeable
scroll area.

tags.name: dvfy-slide
tags.description: Individual slide within a dvfy-carousel container.

tags.name: dvfy-checkbox
tags.description:
Checkbox input with label, tri-state cycling, and size variants.

When the `indeterminate` attribute is set at initialization, clicking
cycles: indeterminate → checked → unchecked → indeterminate → ...
Without `indeterminate`, standard binary toggle applies.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: Show indeterminate (dash) state; enables tri-state cycling

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Label placement: top | right | bottom | left (default: "right")

properties.name: indeterminate
properties.description: Show indeterminate (dash) state; enables tri-state cycling

tags.name: dvfy-drawer
tags.description:
Collapsible drawer panel for side or bottom content.

A reusable panel that slides in from a configurable edge. Supports
collapse/expand with an animated transition and a vertical reopen tab
that appears when collapsed. Scrollable body for long content while
the parent layout stays fixed.

attributes.name: header
attributes.description: Header title and reopen tab text (default: "Panel")

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Edge position: top | right | bottom | left (default: "right")

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: CSS size value for the drawer dimension (default: "clamp(200px, 40%, 320px)")

attributes.name: fixed
attributes.description: Disable collapse toggle and reopen tab (always open)

attributes.name: no-header
attributes.description: Hide the header bar (for embedding inside other components)

slots.description: Default slot for drawer body content

tags.name: dvfy-dropdown
tags.description: Dropdown menu with keyboard navigation and click-outside closing.

slots.description: First child element is the trigger; remaining children become menu items

tags.name: dvfy-empty
tags.description: Empty state placeholder with icon, title, description, and action area.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Emoji or text icon shown above the title

tags.name: dvfy-gradient-card
tags.description: Card with a radial gradient 'light source' that follows the cursor on hover.

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description: Enable hover effect and cursor pointer

tags.name: dvfy-hamburger
tags.description:
Animated hamburger icon button — a Tier 1 primitive for menu toggles.

Six animation variants transform three bars into different shapes on toggle.
Composable into nav, header, and sidebar components.

attributes.name: animation
attributes.description: x | x-rotate-r | x-rotate-l | chevron-left | chevron-right | minus

attributes.name: float
attributes.description: top-left | top-right | mid-top | mid-right | mid-bottom | mid-left | center | bottom-left | bottom-right

cssProperties.name: --dvfy-hamburger-color
cssProperties.description: Top and bottom bar + border color (default: var(--dvfy-primary-bg))

tags.name: dvfy-input
tags.description: Text input with label, error/help text, and password visibility toggle.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Input type: text | email | password | etc. (default: "text")

attributes.name: no-preview
attributes.description: Disable password visibility toggle for password inputs

attributes.name: clearable
attributes.description: Show clear icon when input has a value

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Label placement: top | right | bottom | left (default: "top")

tags.name: dvfy-loader
tags.description: Loading spinner with spinner and dots variants, optional brand icon overlay.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: URL to brand icon shown at center of spinner

cssProperties.name: --dvfy-primary-bg
cssProperties.description: Spinner accent color and dot color

tags.name: dvfy-modal
tags.description: Modal dialog with backdrop, focus trap, and keyboard support.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Dialog size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Prevent dismissal via backdrop click or Escape key

tags.name: dvfy-nav
tags.description:
Responsive navigation bar composing dvfy-hamburger for animated mobile toggle.
Uses container queries for responsive behavior. Mobile menu renders as a
slide-in drawer from the right edge.

attributes.name: scroll-shrink
attributes.description: Reduce padding and add shadow on scroll

attributes.name: animation
attributes.description: Hamburger animation: x | x-rotate-r | x-rotate-l | chevron-left | chevron-right | minus

slots.description: Navigation links (<a>) and action elements (buttons, etc.)

tags.name: dvfy-page-transition
tags.description: View Transitions API wrapper for MPA and SPA transitions.

tags.name: dvfy-pagination
tags.description: Page navigation with ellipsis and prev/next controls.

tags.name: dvfy-progress
tags.description: Progress indicator with bar and circle variants.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Color status: default | success | warning | danger

tags.name: dvfy-radio
tags.description: Radio button with label and automatic group management.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name (groups radios with same name)

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Label placement: top | right | bottom | left (default: "right")

cssProperties.name: --dvfy-primary-bg
cssProperties.description: Selected radio dot and border color

tags.name: dvfy-scramble-hover
tags.description:
Evervault-style character scramble on hover. Characters cycle through random
glyphs and resolve sequentially to reveal the original text.

events.name: scramble-end
events.description: Scramble animation completes, all characters resolved

tags.name: dvfy-scroll-progress
tags.description: CSS scroll-driven reading progress bar.

tags.name: dvfy-section
tags.description: Collapsible section with summary header and toggle animation.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Expanded state (default: true unless collapsed is set)

tags.name: dvfy-select
tags.description: Enhanced select dropdown with search, keyboard navigation, and native mobile fallback.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Label placement: top | right | bottom | left (default: "top")

tags.name: dvfy-sidebar
tags.description: Side navigation with collapsible compact mode and automatic active link highlighting.

tags.name: dvfy-sidebar-section
tags.description: Sidebar section with label heading.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Section heading text (hidden when sidebar is collapsed)

tags.name: dvfy-slider
tags.description: Knob-primitive slider with grooved track, optional fill bar, and range mode.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current value (or lower bound in range mode)

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Label placement: top | right | bottom | left (default: "top")

attributes.name: value-end
attributes.description: Upper bound value (only in range mode)

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: show-value
attributes.description: Show current value next to slider

attributes.name: no-fill
attributes.description: Hide the fill bar (shown by default)

attributes.name: steps
attributes.description: Number of divisions for tick marks (e.g. 5 = 6 ticks)

properties.name: value
properties.description: Current value (or lower bound in range mode)

events.name: input
events.description: Fires on drag. detail: { value } or { value, valueEnd } in range mode

events.name: change
events.description: Fires on release. detail: { value } or { value, valueEnd } in range mode

tags.name: dvfy-spotlight-card
tags.description:
Premium card with a dual-layer radial gradient spotlight that follows the
mouse cursor — a glowing border rim and an inner surface highlight.

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description: Enable cursor pointer and active scale

tags.name: dvfy-switch
tags.description: Toggle switch with label and description text.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Label placement: top | right | bottom | left (default: "right")

attributes.name: round
attributes.description: Use fully rounded track and thumb (pill shape)

attributes.name: icon-on
attributes.description: Icon/emoji shown in thumb when checked

attributes.name: icon-off
attributes.description: Icon/emoji shown in thumb when unchecked

tags.name: dvfy-table
tags.description: Enhanced data table with sorting, filtering, selection, and global search.

attributes.name: filterable
attributes.description: Excel-style dropdown filters on data-filter columns

events.name: selection-change
events.description: Row selection changed, detail: { selected: number[] }

events.name: filter-change
events.description: Column filter changed, detail: { column, values }

cssProperties.name: --dvfy-primary-bg
cssProperties.description: Active filter icon and sort indicator color

tags.name: dvfy-tabs
tags.description: Tabbed content container with keyboard navigation.

tags.name: dvfy-tab
tags.description: Individual tab panel within a dvfy-tabs container.

tags.name: dvfy-tag
tags.description: Interactive tag/chip with removable variant.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Status color: neutral | success | warning | danger | info (default: "neutral")

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: removable
attributes.description: Show remove button and dispatch remove event

tags.name: dvfy-text-stagger
tags.description: Stagger text reveal animation triggered by IntersectionObserver on scroll.

attributes.name: once
attributes.description: Animate only once; omit or set "once=false" to replay (default: true)

tags.name: dvfy-text-vortex
tags.description:
Spiral scroll text vortex. Characters spiral inward on scroll using CSS
sibling-index()/sibling-count() and scroll-driven animations.

slots.description: Text content to spiral (only text content is used)

tags.name: dvfy-textarea
tags.description: Multiline text input with auto-resize, character count, and error/help text.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Label placement: top | right | bottom | left (default: "top")

tags.name: dvfy-theme-switcher
tags.description: Theme dropdown and dark/light toggle. Hides dropdown when only one theme is available.

attributes.name: default-theme
attributes.description: Initial theme name (default: first option's value)

tags.name: dvfy-toast
tags.description:
Toast notification with auto-dismiss and status-based styling.
Use the static `DvfyToast.show()` method to create toasts programmatically.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Toast status: info | success | warning | danger (default: "info")

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Screen position: top-right | top-left | bottom-right | bottom-left (default: "top-right")

tags.name: dvfy-tooltip
tags.description: Tooltip shown on hover/focus with configurable position and delay.

slots.description: Trigger element that the tooltip is attached to

tags.name: dvfy-tree-view
tags.description: Interactive tree view for hierarchical navigation (VS Code file explorer style).

tags.name: dvfy-tree-node
tags.description: A node within a tree view. Can be a branch (has children) or leaf (has href).

properties.name: isBranch
properties.description: Whether this node has child nodes (is a branch)

slots.description: Child dvfy-tree-node elements for branch nodes

tags.name: dvfy-confirm
tags.description: Confirmation modal that intercepts a trigger action. Supports HTMX attribute interception.

attributes.name: method
attributes.description: HTTP method: post | put | patch | delete (default: "post")

slots.description: Trigger element (button, link) that opens the confirmation modal

tags.name: dvfy-htmx-form
tags.description: Enhanced form with HTMX submission, validation, loading overlay, and toast feedback.

attributes.name: method
attributes.description: HTTP method: post | put | patch | delete (default: "post")

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: CSS selector for response target (default: self)

attributes.name: error-message
attributes.description: Toast message on error (default: "Something went wrong")

tags.name: dvfy-htmx-table
tags.description: Server-side sorted, filtered, paginated table via HTMX or fetch fallback.

slots.description: A <table> with <thead> defining columns; use <th data-sort="col"> for sortable columns

cssProperties.name: --dvfy-primary-bg
cssProperties.description: Active sort indicator and pagination button color

tags.name: dvfy-infinite-scroll
tags.description: Infinite scroll loader using IntersectionObserver. Loads pages via HTMX or fetch fallback.

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Base URL for loading more items

attributes.name: page-param
attributes.description: Query parameter name for page number (default: "page")

attributes.name: threshold
attributes.description: Pixels from bottom to trigger load (default: 200)

attributes.name: no-more-text
attributes.description: Text shown when all items loaded (default: "No more items")

tags.name: dvfy-live-search
tags.description: Debounced search input that loads results via HTMX or fetch fallback.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: CSS selector for results container (default: auto-created sibling)

properties.name: value
properties.description: Programmatic access to current search value
